snippet.title: Mission Valentine | Ashish Chanchlani
snippet.description:
Download the OctaFX Trading App at https://bit.ly/Chanchlani_OctaFX and get 5000 USD in your demo account 💵. Start making extra money with the "Best Forex Broker in India 2020" - OctaFX🏆📈

Aa gaya humara naya video
MISSION VALENTINE!
PURA VIDEO END TAK DEKHNA
Warna maza nai aaega
Bahut time baad tum sab seth logo ke lie ek one story video banayi
Haan maalum hai tum sabko laga 3rd part aaega valentine ka 
Lekin dekha humne kaise usko tease kiya video mein😉
Acha sachi bolta hu is video ke peeche 1 mahina lag gaya,from scripting to editing islie itna delay ho gaya video
Maafi seth log.
But maza aa gaya
Ye descrption main aaj subah ke 6 baje hagte hue likh raha hu socho kitni fatt gayi😂
Wo sab chodho ye humara pehla video hai jisme humne first time ek naye aspect ko introduce kiya aur normalize kiya
(Lekin DOKHA paap hai saalo yaad rakhna)
Abhi suno kasam se kehta hu is baar puri ki puri editing maine ki
Is baar video mein puri ki puri ACV team hai
Except Anmol
Except Grishim
Except Muski
Okay lol..
Is video mein kaafi naye chehre bhi dekhne mile honge jinhone bahut amazing performance diya
Introducing ACV team mein Bhavika Motwani as kaam-waali didi
Super talented Vivek Menon (@Watermenon Pictures ) apne beyounick ki team se (teesra hawaldar after kunal & tushar😂)
Aur to aur wo hotel waali ladki jo bhaag gayi Ritika bajaj
Baaki sab purane chawal hai ACV team ke likhte likhte thak jaunga
@Akash Dodeja as mc dost
@Kunal Chhabhria  as lavaris baap
@Simran Dhanwani meri valentine 
Manvita Chhabhria (kunal ki real life biwi aur meri reel life mummy)
@Rohit Sadhwani  as harami manager
@Ritesh Sadhwani  wo paneer-dudh waala 
@Tanish Sirwani  wo dank hotel guest
@Jashan Sirwani  wo hotel waala jo mam ke saath aaya tha
Akash jagtap wo acha desh ka nagrik jo buzurko ki madad karta hai (dont judge a book by its cover)
@Paras Rupani  as bhagoda boyfriend
Animesh Makhija wo nanga dodta hua guest (bhai ki body achi thi toh nanga scene kiya apne liye🙌🏻)
Karan dhanwani rota hua aashiq (dhyaan se dekhna)
Camera @Siddharth Kedare  urf cinderella ne sambhala (shoot khatam hote hi bhaag jaata hai saala)
Lights aur production sirwani brothers ( mere mama ke ladke, aaj kal 50 r lete hai din ka)
Sound handling by ritesh wohi dudh waala
Ladka acha hai but jokes gande maarta hai
Wo hotel couple of wala scene ka idea was idea by Ashi chawla (idea ache deta hai par shooting se darta hai)
Baaki script writing & direction by your chanchu❤️
Seth log agar ye video pasand aayi toh please
Like chodh ke jaana
Mast comment karna favorite scene aur video apne committed (if they exist) as well as single ( matlab sab log😂)
ke saath share karna
Baaki toh tum seth log ko  maalum hai tumhara ashu tum acvians se kitna pyaar karta hai😘
#AshishChanchlani #MissionValentine #Acvians

snippet.title: Kuch Toh Hai | कुछ तो है | Episode 01 | 07 February 2021
snippet.description:
Priya, an orphan, who becomes an overnight news sensation after surviving a deadly fall from her college building, sets out on a voyage to find the source of her supernatural powers, her mother. However, with danger lurking around at every corner for her, where will Priya's fate take her?
#ColorsTV #KuchTohHai

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

To go to the show playlist please click: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLcC6hSpO26KtGMWWGWEwISMugO_764Tgz

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Bani, the adi naagin challenged the laws of nature and loved Veer, the cheel. The result? The birth of Rehaan - a deadly creature with both their qualities. But, what happens when he falls in love with Priya, a fairy? An epic saga unfolds!

snippet.title: श्रीकृष्णले २करोड दिन्छु अर्कै सङ बिहे गर भनेका थिए|अन्तरबार्तामै गंगालाइ गरे फिल्मको लागि प्रस्ताव|
snippet.description:
Host:Ganga lama
Edit/Camera: Man Ghising
हामि समाजमा,देशमा घटेका बिभिन्न घटनाहरुलाई सत्य र निस्पक्क्ष ढंगले तपाइँ सामु ल्याउने छौ साथै विभिन्न कलाकारहरु संगको रोचक सम्बाद हेर्नको लागि कृपया हाम्रो च्यानल GOOD TV लाइ SUBSCRIBE गर्न नभुल्नु होला धन्यबाद !!!
Note- के तपाईसंग पनि केहि अनौठो कला छ ?, तपाई नजिकका व्यक्ति पो त्यस्तो प्रतिभावान हुनुहुन्छ कि ?, या समाजमा कोहि अन्यायमा परेको, असक्त, दुखि  ,पिडित पो हुनुहुन्छ कि ? यदि छ या देख्नुभयो भने हाम्रो सम्पर्क नम्बर 9849148126 मा सम्पर्क गरि सामाजिक दायित्व पुरा गरौ, पिडितलाई राहत दिलाउन आजै बाट हातेमालो गरौl  
यस च्यानलमा रहेका Video हरु कपि, Download गरी अन्य Channel मा upload गरेको पाएमा प्रचलित कानुन बमोजिम कडा भन्दा कडा कारबाही गरिनेछ ।
हामि समाजमा,देशमा घटेका बिभिन्न घटनाहरुलाई सत्य र निस्पक्क्ष ढंगले तपाइँ सामु ल्याउने छौ। 
#भिडियो_अन्तिम_सम्म_हेरि_सेयर_गर्नुहोला

snippet.description:

HAPPY VALENTINES DAY!!!

Gulshan Kumar & T-Series presents Bhushan Kumar's "Chhor Denge", a brand new song in the voice of “Parampara Tandon" featuring Nora Fatehi & Ehan Bhat. The lyrics of new song are penned by Yogesh Dubey &  music composed by Sachet-Parampara. The video is directed by Arvindr Khaira.

♪Stream the Full Song Here♪

snippet.title: Mystery Of The Infants | C.I.D | सीआईडी | Real Heroes
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to LIV Crime: 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCzXpAx4v6rFLYXkJZ5nmSvQ?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch all the episodes of real heroes: 
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL0y08jtgaKIVIYFOZ8qi-3qMLgI8sKQmY

Many people in a society chase a man. The man then goes inside one of the houses and picks up a baby. When the people get their hands on the man, they start hitting him. Two women identify the baby and Bhavish and Jyoti's daughter. When they go to their house, they are shocked to find both of them dead and the CID team is approached for further investigation. Who killed the couple? Watch this episode to find out.

About CID:
-----------------
The first thrilling investigative series on Indian Television is today one of the most popular shows on Sony Entertainment Television. Dramatic and absolutely unpredictable, C.I.D. has captivated viewers over the last eleven years and continues to keep audiences glued to their television sets with its thrilling plots and excitement. Also interwoven in its fast-paced plots are the personal challenges that the C.I.D. team faces with non-stop adventure, tremendous pressure, and risk, all in the name of duty. The series consists of hard-core police procedural stories dealing with investigation, detection, and suspense. The protagonists of the serial are an elite group of police officers belonging to the Crime Investigation Department of the police force, led by ACP Pradyuman [played by the dynamic Shivaji Satam]. While the stories are plausible, there is an emphasis on dramatic plotting and technical complexities faced by the police. At every stage, the plot throws up intriguing twists and turns to keep the officers on the move as they track criminals, led by the smallest of clues

snippet.title: 2021 CHAKRA New Released Hindi Dubbed Movie | Naga Shaurya New Hindi Dubbed Movie | Mehreen Pirzada
snippet.description:
Gana (Naga Shaurya) returns to India for his sister Priya's (Sargun Kaur Luthra) marriage but is shocked to see her trying to commit suicide one night, and is shocked to learn she is pregnant but does not know who impregnated her. Gana explains this to her fiancé Ravi (Prince Cecil) who understands the situation, helps Priya get aborted, and promises to keep this a secret. Gana further convinces Priya to move on and forget about the past, which she does and happily gets married. After her marriage, Gana violently fights and interrogates men who troubled Priya in the past, only to learn none of them are behind her impregnation. Soon, another mysteriously impregnated woman named Sadhana commits suicide, and Gana reads her suicide letter explaining she didn't know how she got pregnant without her knowledge. Gana meets her parents and discovers her hospital reports according to which she fainted 3 months ago and was admitted by someone. Realizing Priya also fainted and was admitted, Gana goes to the hospital and finds out Sadhana was admitted in an emergency by an ambulance. He then learns that more girls named Lakshmi and Monica were also admitted by a similar ambulance.

The next day, Gana's girlfriend Neha (Mehreen Pirzada) informs him about her friend who fainted in the mall and was taken in an ambulance that hasn't arrived at the hospital yet. Gana rushes to the hospital and with help from the technical department, chases after the ambulances equipped with trackers. He stops many ambulances but doesn't find Neha's friend inside. Soon, he reaches a dead end and abandons his bike. Using his parkour skills, he chases after an ambulance, only to find him looking at another one that isn't being tracked. He ambushes the ambulance, fights off the men inside, and rescues Neha's friend. On the other hand, a psychopathic pathologist named Dr. Manoj Kumar (Jisshu Sengupta) is revealed to be the mastermind behind the pregnant girls, who then eliminates the fishermen. Later, Neha questions Gana's recent attitude towards her, forcing him to reveal his mission and what happened to Priya. Soon, a minister's daughter named Sowmya is killed and her corpse is dropped in front of the police station. With Neha's help, Gana manages to access Sowmya's laptop and receives photos where he spots an old man, Manoj's grandfather. Further, Gana manages to access CCTV footage of Sowmya buying a perfume from a vendor who reveals the old man told him to sell the perfumes and paid him for it. Since Sowmya was a drug addict, she wasn't unconscious despite being subject to anesthesia and thus knew about Manoj. Despite his friend's insistence not to do so, Manoj ended up killing her. Back to the present, the cops ask Manoj to perform an autopsy on Sowmya.

Gana then explains to Neha that all the victims, though unrelated, were admitted to hospital because of Hypoglycemia induced artificially by a banned drug called Hypomacene. Gana later visits the mall to view surveillance footage and discovers an address that leads him to Manoj's house. Having seen him talk about the autopsy on TV, Gana asks him for help with the case while Manoj tells him to wait for coffee. Manoj explains to his friend that he'd kill Gana, but receiving a call from Neha about the old man dumping another corpse in front of the police station, Gana secretly runs away. A car chase ensues, resulting in the old man's death after Manoj drops a cargo container on his car. Gana then goes to Manoj's house where he discovers dead bodies in separate vessels before Manoj arrives there with his friend. Manoj's friend, who turns out to be his father, removes his belt and starts beating him. It is then revealed that Manoj was psychopathic as a kid and even killed his father who since then appeared as a hallucination. Back to the present,Gana fights with Manoj and beats his head with a glass bottle. He throws him to a wardrobe and Gana drops a chandelier over him. Manoj is laughing, but when he sees his death weapon coming towards him , he faints. The chandelier falls over Manoj killing him. He then receives a call from his father who pranks him into believing a man is trying to harass Priya. Gana arrives home, and finds out Priya is now happily pregnant with Ravi's child

Harke Haldar is a funny weekly Nepali comedy (drama) serial on Kantipur Television HD from one of the rural village of Nepal, where the story revolves around the main character ex. Stalin is a 2006 Indian Telugu-language action drama film directed by A. R. Murugadoss. It stars Chiranjeevi and Trisha, while an ensemble cast including Prakash Raj, Sharada, Khushbu Sundar, Pradeep Rawat, and Brahmanandam in supporting roles.[2] The film was screened at the International Film Festival of India in the mainstream section.[3][4] Movie was blockbuster. The film was later dubbed in Hindi under the same name.

The film was remade into Hindi titled, Jai Ho, directed by Sohail Khan, starring Salman Khan, Daisy Shah, and Tabu. The film released on 20 September 2006.This movie was based on Pay it forward(film)

snippet.description:
सुमधुर स्वरका धनी बाल दोहोरी गायक प्रिन्स लम्साल र सुमधुर स्वरकी धनी लोकदोहोरी गायिका आशा बि.सी.  बिचको निकै रमाईलो दोहोरी "डोको बुनेर" प्रस्तुत गरेका छौँ  लाईक कमेन्ट सेयर गरिदिनुहोला धन्यवाद ।

snippet.title: Pani Padhero 2 | Kurai Bujhdaina | Bhim Bista & Eleena Chauhan | New Nepali Song 2021
snippet.description:
Presenting new Nepali song Pani Padhero ( Kurai Bujhdaina) by Bhim Bista & Eleena Chauhan only on Eenakshi Entertainment's official YouTube channel.

Eenakshi Entertainment Presents:- New Nepali Song 2021

|| Pani Padhero 2 Kurai Bujhdaina कुरै बुझ्दैन (पानी पँधेरो-2) || 

#BhimBista #EleenaChauhan #EenakshiEntertainment #NewNepaliSong
------------------------------------------

♪ Singer:-
Bhim Bista
Eleena Chauhan

♪ Music:-
Bhim Bista

♪ Lyrics:-
Bhim Bista

♪ Arrange:-
Jeevan Badu

♪ Mix/Master:-
Shyamshwet Rasaily

♪ Studio:- 
Big Parivesh

♪ Flute:- 
Ratna Flute

♪ Guitar/Mendolin:- 
Sanjib Baraily

------------------------------------------

🎬️ Video Credits:-

🎬 Artists:-
Bhim Bista
Eleena Chauhan

🎬 Cameraman:- 
Prakash Khadka

🎬 MUA:- 
Mahi Singh

🎬 Edit/Color:-
Dinson Shah

🎬 Technical Adviser:-
Rajendra Aryal

🎬 Publicity Designer:- 
Dinson Shah

कुरै बुझ्दैन Lyrics:- 
तिम्रे फुटो छातिमा टाँस्या छु
तिमी साथमा छौ र पो हाँस्या छु
कुरै बुझ्दैन
निन्द्रा पनि लाग्दैन खाना पनि रुच्दैन
मायालुले कुरै बुझ्दैन

G-1
एउटा कुरा भन्छु ल आज म
तिमी नै छौ मुटुको माझमा
कुरै बुझ्दैन
निद्रा पनि लाग्दैन खाना पनि रुच्दैन
मायालुले कुरै बुझ्दैन

B-2
लाली गुराँस फुल फुल्यो बनैमा
तिमी फुल्यौ फक्रक्कै मनैमा कुरै बुझ्दैन

G-2
मुना मदन पढेको कथामा
तिमी र म जिबनभर साथमा कुरै बुझ्दैन

B-3
तिम्लाई सम्झि टोलाउँछु छिनछिनै
झनझन माया बड्दै छ दिनदिनै कुरै बुझ्दैन
बोल्दा पनि बोल्दैन हेर्दा पनि हेर्दैन
मायालुले माया गर्दैन

G-3
जोडी ढुकुर जैले नि साथैमा
तिम्रै नाऊँको मेहेन्दी हातैमा कुरै बुझ्दैन
बोल्दा पनि बोल्दैन हेर्दा पनि हेर्दैन
मायालुले माया गर्दैन

B-4
मनको कुरो मनैमा सिमित
कैले हामी हुने खै तिमी म कुरेै बुझ्दैन

G-4
घामले पोल्छ शितलु छायाँ छ
मुटुभरि  उसैको माया छ कुरै बुझ्दैन

B-5
भन्न खोज्छु भन्नलाइ डराऊँछु
कति धेरै उस्लाई मन पराऊँछु कुरै बुझ्दैन
निन्द्रा पनि...

G-5
आखै फुटोस संसारेै हेर्दिन
तिम्ले छोडे सास नै फेर्दिन कुरै बुझ्दैन
निन्द्रा पनि....

© Eenakshi Entertainment Pty. Ltd., 2021
------------------------------------------------

Facebook:- https://tinyurl.com/yy6gvqer
Whatsapp:- +61430738444 
e-mail:- Kandel256@gmail.com

snippet.title: Naagin 5 | नागिन 5 | Episode 52 | 06 February 2021
snippet.description:
After getting backstabbed by Jay more than once, Bani decides to not repeat her mistake of giving him another chance. However, as she advances to land a lethal blow upon Jay, he uses deception and freezes her by throwing a potion! Now, with a frozen body that continues to drop below deadly temperature, how will Bani make it to safety?

#ColorsTV #Naagin5

snippet.title: Unheard Stories Of Sir Ratan Tata | Biography | Case Study | Dr Vivek Bindra
snippet.description:
Dr. Vivek Bindra is an International Motivational Speaker, Leadership Consultant &  Business Coach. He has been awarded Honorary Ph.D. Degree, Doctor of Philosophy. 
He is a Trusted Advisor to over 1500+ corporates. He has also been an Inspirational Pathfinder to various high-profile entrepreneurs and other top-notch business entities providing Leadership excellence for taking their organizations to the next level. He has been instrumental in providing CEO coaching to over Top 100 CEOs in the country.

snippet.title: Meri Bassai  ft. Sachin Pariyar || मेरी बास्सै || Ep-686 || Jan-19-2021 || Media Hub|| Nepali Comedy
snippet.description:
Meri Bassai is one of the longest and most popular Nepali comedy serials with 16 Years of broadcasting. Based on rural lifestyle and lower-middle-class people, the series represents many political and social issues on its episodes with educational comedy flavour. It is aired in Nepal Television at 8:45 PM and in YouTube at 9:30 PM every Tuesday. This show is produced by Media Hub Pvt. Ltd. 

The story is based on the rural lifestyle and lower-middle-class people. The show represents many political as well as social issues on its episodes with educational comedy flavour.

Production: Media Hub Pvt. Ltd.
Digital Partner: Branding Bee Pvt. Ltd. 
Production Advisor: Som Dhital
Direction: Daman Rupakheti 
Editor: Rabin Bhatta
Sub-Editor: Ashok Chaudhary
Graphics: Rajendra Manandhar

snippet.title: 28 PARENTING HACKS From Crafty Moms And Dads || Tips for Being Friends with Your Child
snippet.description:
Tips and tricks every parent will be thankful for. 

Being a parent isn’t an easy task, and most of the time, parents come across more problems than they can solve. Well, to help you out, I wanted to share with you some amazing hacks that will save you time and the hassle that comes with taking care of a little one. Painting is everyone’s favorite activity, but it can be very messy — and clothes get destroyed. So, to keep your little one’s outfit nice and clean, use a plastic bag as an apron for them. Toddlers tend to drop their pacifiers all the time, and once the pacifier is down, it needs to be cleaned. To prevent that from happening, tie the pacifier on a balloon. You can use a closet organizer and label it for each day of the week to make sure that picking outfits for the day won’t take hours. Watch until the end to discover all the genius parenting hacks you need to know. 

Timestamps: 

0:31 — The pacifier hack 

2:42 — A little water, pepper, and soap experiment 

5:32 — The getting along/best friends’ shirt 

7:20 — Face mask too big? Try this hack 

8:58 — Tasty gummy bear lollies
This video is made for entertainment purposes. We do not make any warranties about the completeness, safety and reliability. Any action you take upon the information on this video is strictly at your own risk, and we will not be liable for any damages or losses. It is the viewer's responsibility to use judgment, care and precautions if one plans to replicate.

Wynk – https://wynk.in/music/song/bhula-dunga/bl_A10320WT037785766X 
Gaana – https://gaana.com/album/what-can-i-do-hindi

Lyrics
(Hook)
Boht sara hype hai apne pass bro 
God bless uh hope u all grow 
Patte chupake rakhela 
Nai karra show 
Nai bolna bro 
Agar tere woh 
dil se na ho 
Vibe nahi match kre 
Milte nai bro 
Jagah full pakdele 
Hilte nai bro 
Sab kare copy mera tareeka 
What can i do 

What can i do (x2)
What can i do yoo
What can i fo 
i got the views 
They wanna walk in my shoes 
What can i do (x3)
What can i do 
I got the moves 
They wanna walk in my shoes


Chapne do bhai 
Style mera dhapne do bhai 
Fame ke bhook mei 
Karrele nakli ladai 
Rapper log banrele bhai 
Kya toh sikhaye tumlogo 
Ke gane se 
Ek hi baat batarele ye zamanse 
Farak nai padta mujhe abhi kisi ke jane se 
Dil ko sambhal warna toot jayega kisiko
Chahnese 
Boht kuch seekhaya mei logo ko gaane 
Bandhiya bhi toh marti apne gaane pe 
Aisehich thodi na alag wajab 
Apan ayele cash deke gaadi pe 
Selected public invited hai party mei 
Dikhna tha smarty toh kam ki daadi mei 
Haters log latakrele mere Naadi mei 
Inkyamaakya apanich hard hai be 

(Hook)

Itne views lana lala tere bas ka nai 
Seedha shot dete bala 
Khota bajta nai 
Sadak ki boli lekin daam apna 
Sasta nai 
Nakli swag video mei lala jachta nai 
Karne kar par 
asal wala feel la 
Emiway fan base 
Dekhe beta sabka bheja hilla 
Diss gane fekde toh 
Chaddi bhi gilla 
Naklipan video mei aur koi ni milla ?

Ye bhai bante video mei 
Apan kulfa karate aise logo ko audio mei 
Jis jis se bhidjate us us ko pel dete 
Baki jo firak mei baithele unlog ko
Tel dete bolte chal masal 
Apan hai asal 
Logo ko pasand 
Har ek gana apna 
Rehta jashan 
Bakiyo ki baatcheet  
 La*da aur lassan 
Meko ni pasand 
Inlog ki soch 
Apni toh public hai dost
Vip meeting no easy approach 
Kaise kiya mei 
Ab baithke tu soch 
Mei mere dost
kamare fatte 
Blessing hai life 
Machare fatte
Nai chaiye advice 

Ua bitch is my ex bro
M receiving text bro 
Its my turn to flex bro 
I own what i manifest bro 
Soo soo many eyes on me 
blessed bro
I Got no time to waste bro 
If uh wanna move 
There are soo many ways bro
M livin my life at the best bro 
Lessgooo 🔥
(Hook)

#emiway #whatcanido #bantai

snippet.description:
Watch the report of Saas Bahu Aur Saazish to know the latest updates from the sets of the serial Kundali Bhagya. Have a look at how choas erupted in Kritika & Akshay's wedding. Stay connected for regular updates on top entertainment stories. 

Watch Saas Bahu aur Saazish (SBS) on ABP News daily at 2:30 PM to know what's happening in Indian television and bollywood industry with Aditi Arora Sawant. Presenting you the latest updates and daily dose of entertainment in the form of star cast interviews, gossips, updates of reality shows, behind the scenes, twist in serials. Join the non stop entertainment with Saas Bahu aur Saazish for all the juicy news.

टेलीविजन और बॉलीवुड इंडस्ट्री के बारे में जानने के लिए एबीपी न्यूज़ पर देखिये सास बहु और साज़िश (एसबीएस) अदिति रॉव सावंत के साथ  रोज़ाना 2:30 बजे। एसबीएस पेश करता है स्टार कास्ट के इंटरव्यू, रियलिटी शो के अपडेट, सीरियल्स के नए मोड़, परदे के पीछे की कुछ गपशप और भी बहुत कुछ। नॉन स्टॉप मनोरंजन के लिए शामिल हों सास बहू और साज़िश के साथ। 

For your daily dose of Entertainment, you can subscribe to our channel on YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/user/sbsabpnews

ABP Hindi: http://abpnews.abplive.in/
ABP English: http://www.abplive.in/

snippet.title: कलाैटे र मुसि सारङ्गि संसारमा आउँदा उधुमै रमाईलो साथमा रियाकाे दाेहाेरि Kalaute, Musi, Riya Ep. 191
snippet.description:
नमस्कार ,
सारङ्गि संसारमा आजको कार्यक्रम सधै भन्दा अलि फरक अनि अझै रमाईलाे प्रस्तुतिका साथ हामी उपस्थित भयका छाै । यहाँहरुले हामिलाई दिनुभयकाे माया र हाैसलाले हामी फुरुङ्ग हुँदै हाम्रा देश तथा बिदेशमा रहनुहुने दर्शक महानुभावहरुकाे मनाेरज्जनका लागि निरन्तर नेपाली माैलिक लाेकदाेहाेरि कार्यक्रम सारङ्गि संसार राेधि घर सन्चालन गर्दै आईरहेका छौँ  । 

आजको प्रस्तुतिमा  हामिले  जीवन भर भाेकाे पेटले सारङ्गि रेटिरहने, अाफु राेयर अरुलाई हसाउदै अनि नचाउदै अाउनुभयका , नेपालकाे माैलिक लाेक बाजा सारङ्गिलाई आफुलाई भन्दा बढि माया गरेर गाउँ गाउँ बस्ति बस्ति पुग्दै मनाेरज्जन दिदै आउनुभयका कलाकार कलाैटे गन्धर्व र मुसि गन्धर्बकाे साथमा छाेरा मिलन गन्धर्व , विराज गन्धर्व सँगै पछिल्लाे समयकि भाईरल लाेकप्रिय  कलाकार रिया खड्का काे साथै सम्पुर्ण सारङ्गि संसार परिवार र हामिलाई सपाेर्ट गर्दै अाउनुभयका मिडियाकर्मि साथिहरुबिच काे जमघट सँगै रमाईलाे कार्यक्रम प्रस्तुत गरेका छाै ।  
 मुसि र कलाैटे , फ्याम्लि फ्याम्लाे काे आगमनले सारङ्गि संसारकाे गरिमा र हाम्राे लक्ष काे उजागार भयकाे छ। गाउघर समाज हुँदै उहाँहरु सारङ्गि संसारकाे मञ्च सम्म सारङ्गि बाेकेरै आउदा हामी अत्यन्तै खुसि र उहाहरुप्रति अाभारि पनि छाै । यहाँ सम्म ल्याईदिनुहुने ए वन टेलिभिजनका सन्चारकर्मि ,कलाकार अमृतमान वलि सर प्रति पनि हामी अाभारि छाै ।कलाैटे बुवा र मुसि अामाकाे परिवारबाट  हामिले जति मनाेरन्जन  लिईरहेका छाै सायद याे रमाईलाे काे मूल्य हामी कहिल्यै तिरेर सक्ने छैनाै । र आज उहाँहरुकाे बास्तबिकतालाई बुझ्दै जाँदा निकै दुख लाग्याे । देश तथा बिदेशमा रहनुहुने भगवानरुपि दर्शक महानुभावहरुले पनप उहाँहरुकाे दुखलाई सहशुस गर्नुहुनेछ र उहाँहरुकाे उचित व्यबस्थापनकाे लागि धेरै थाेरै सहयाेग गर्नुहुनेछ भन्दा अासा पनि लियका छाै । यहाँहरुले पठाउने सहयाेगलाई हामिले अर्काे कार्यक्रममा उहाँहरुकै हातमा जस्ताकाे तस्तै हस्तान्तरण गर्ने छाै ।
सहयाेगका  लागि 
कमल कुमार बि. क. Kamal Kumar BK  9841889961

localized.title: कलाैटे र मुसि सारङ्गि संसारमा आउँदा उधुमै रमाईलो साथमा रियाकाे दाेहाेरि Kalaute, Musi, Riya Ep. 191
localized.description:
नमस्कार ,
सारङ्गि संसारमा आजको कार्यक्रम सधै भन्दा अलि फरक अनि अझै रमाईलाे प्रस्तुतिका साथ हामी उपस्थित भयका छाै । यहाँहरुले हामिलाई दिनुभयकाे माया र हाैसलाले हामी फुरुङ्ग हुँदै हाम्रा देश तथा बिदेशमा रहनुहुने दर्शक महानुभावहरुकाे मनाेरज्जनका लागि निरन्तर नेपाली माैलिक लाेकदाेहाेरि कार्यक्रम सारङ्गि संसार राेधि घर सन्चालन गर्दै आईरहेका छौँ  । 

आजको प्रस्तुतिमा  हामिले  जीवन भर भाेकाे पेटले सारङ्गि रेटिरहने, अाफु राेयर अरुलाई हसाउदै अनि नचाउदै अाउनुभयका , नेपालकाे माैलिक लाेक बाजा सारङ्गिलाई आफुलाई भन्दा बढि माया गरेर गाउँ गाउँ बस्ति बस्ति पुग्दै मनाेरज्जन दिदै आउनुभयका कलाकार कलाैटे गन्धर्व र मुसि गन्धर्बकाे साथमा छाेरा मिलन गन्धर्व , विराज गन्धर्व सँगै पछिल्लाे समयकि भाईरल लाेकप्रिय  कलाकार रिया खड्का काे साथै सम्पुर्ण सारङ्गि संसार परिवार र हामिलाई सपाेर्ट गर्दै अाउनुभयका मिडियाकर्मि साथिहरुबिच काे जमघट सँगै रमाईलाे कार्यक्रम प्रस्तुत गरेका छाै ।  
 मुसि र कलाैटे , फ्याम्लि फ्याम्लाे काे आगमनले सारङ्गि संसारकाे गरिमा र हाम्राे लक्ष काे उजागार भयकाे छ। गाउघर समाज हुँदै उहाँहरु सारङ्गि संसारकाे मञ्च सम्म सारङ्गि बाेकेरै आउदा हामी अत्यन्तै खुसि र उहाहरुप्रति अाभारि पनि छाै । यहाँ सम्म ल्याईदिनुहुने ए वन टेलिभिजनका सन्चारकर्मि ,कलाकार अमृतमान वलि सर प्रति पनि हामी अाभारि छाै ।कलाैटे बुवा र मुसि अामाकाे परिवारबाट  हामिले जति मनाेरन्जन  लिईरहेका छाै सायद याे रमाईलाे काे मूल्य हामी कहिल्यै तिरेर सक्ने छैनाै । र आज उहाँहरुकाे बास्तबिकतालाई बुझ्दै जाँदा निकै दुख लाग्याे । देश तथा बिदेशमा रहनुहुने भगवानरुपि दर्शक महानुभावहरुले पनप उहाँहरुकाे दुखलाई सहशुस गर्नुहुनेछ र उहाँहरुकाे उचित व्यबस्थापनकाे लागि धेरै थाेरै सहयाेग गर्नुहुनेछ भन्दा अासा पनि लियका छाै । यहाँहरुले पठाउने सहयाेगलाई हामिले अर्काे कार्यक्रममा उहाँहरुकै हातमा जस्ताकाे तस्तै हस्तान्तरण गर्ने छाै ।
सहयाेगका  लागि 
कमल कुमार बि. क. Kamal Kumar BK  9841889961

snippet.title: Pinjara Khubsurti Ka | पिंजरा खुबसूरती का | Episode 126 | Coming Up Next
snippet.description:
Omkar and Mayura face a similar deadly situation which changed their lives forever. What game will fate play this time? Watch this sneak peek of the upcoming episode.

#ColorsTV #PinjaraKhubsurtiKa

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Mayura is the epitome of beauty, grace and intelligence, but the world only sees her beauty. Trapped in a cage by a society that judges by looks, Mayura yearns for her freedom to fly free. What happens to her fight for individuality when she ends up in a marriage with Omkar, a control freak obsessed with her beauty? Will he ever see his wife beyond her physical form? Will Mayura ever fulfil her own dreams? Or will she remain trapped in her beautiful pinjaraa for life?

snippet.title: Din Gin Gin 'दिन गिन गिन' New Song 2021 by Anu Chaudhary & Naresh Jogi || Paul Shah & Garima Sharma
snippet.description:
"Din Gin Gin" A typical Nepali Cultural Tharu song. This song tries to show Tharu art and culture .The singers of this song Anu Chaudhary & Naresh Jogi are very knowledgeable about Tharu art and culture. Featuring With Paul Shah well known popular Nepali Movie Actor in the Nepalese film industry and Garima Sharma also a very talented rising Nepali actress in the Nepalese Music industry. This song have been filmed in various beautiful places of the Tarai in Tharu Communities. The song is directed by Bikram Chauhan & Cinematographed by Arjun Tiwari.

snippet.title: Gharko jhyalaima | Chatra Shahi, Menuka Pariyar, Rabina Basel & Milan Tamata | New Dohori Song 2021
snippet.description:
S3K Entertainment presents a typical and cultural new lok dohori song "gharko Jhyalaima" 2077/2021. The singers of this song Chhatra Shahi, Rabina Basel & Milan Tamata are from one of the popular live dohori show "Indreni". Indreni is a popular Television and Youtube Program in Nepal which has been broadcasting from Television and Indreni Official Youtube Since 6 years. 
Menuka Pariyar is also a very skilled and talented singer. Most of the songs she sang by are also very popular and most viewed in nepal.
Featuring artists on this song are Jibesh Singh Gurung, Lomash Sharma, Alina Rayamajhi, Samiksha Pokhrel & Punya Gautam. Jibesh Singh Gurung is a popular and talented actor, director, and writer at Colleges Nepal comedy series. Alina Rayamajhi & Samiksha Pokhrel are rising and talented actresses in Nepalese film & music Industry. And Lomash Sharma, a handsome, talented and most skilled rising star in nepali folk music industry.
Special Appearance Punya Gautam, who has been active in politics since childhood, aims to serve the country and the people selflessly by engaging in politics all of his life.

►©►S3K Entertainment Pvt. Ltd 2021. All Rights Reserved.

snippet.title: Meri Bassai || श्री स्वस्थानी विशेष || मेरी बास्सै || Ep-688 || Feb-02-2021 || Media Hub
snippet.description:
Meri Bassai is one of the longest and most popular Nepali comedy serials with 16 Years of broadcasting. Based on rural lifestyle and lower-middle-class people, the series represents many political and social issues on its episodes with educational comedy flavour. It is aired in Nepal Television at 8:45 PM and in YouTube at 9:30 PM every Tuesday. This show is produced by Media Hub Pvt. Ltd. 

The story is based on the rural lifestyle and lower-middle-class people. The show represents many political as well as social issues on its episodes with educational comedy flavour.

Production: Media Hub Pvt. Ltd.
Digital Partner: Branding Bee Pvt. Ltd. 
Production Advisor: Som Dhital
Direction: Daman Rupakheti 
Editor: Rabin Bhatta
Sub-Editor: Ashok Chaudhary
Graphics: Rajendra Manandhar
Script Writer: Kunjan Bhattarai
Camera: Rahul Rai
Makeup: Nirmala Acharya
Title song Writer: Shankar Adhikari 
Music/Singer: Chetan Sapkota 
Artists: Surbir Pandit, Ramchandra Adhikari, Daman Rupakheti,  Surendra K.C, Palpasa Dangol, Suraj Chapagain, Januka Poudel, Niru Khadka, Tika bhakta Jirel, Ratna Prajapati, Lekhant Bhusal(Lekharaj), Diwakar Bhandari, Madhu Acharya, Krishna Joshi, Dhanaram Muskan, Sarswoti Fuyal, Dharma Prasad Bhattarai and many more.

About Harke Haldar :

Harke Haldar is a funny weekly Nepali comedy (drama) serial on Kantipur Television HD from one of the rural village of Nepal, where the story revolves around the main character ex. Hawaldar (Harke ) along with his troublesome neighbors. Harke Haldar is the most viewed television programs in Nepal showed in Kantipur Television HD. This is also a social serial that resembles typical Nepali Society. This program was aired in Kantipur Television on 22 January 2021 at 9:00 PM

About Harke Haldar :

Harke Haldar is a funny weekly Nepali comedy (drama) serial on Kantipur Television HD from one of the rural village of Nepal, where the story revolves around the main character ex. Hawaldar (Harke ) along with his troublesome neighbors. Harke Haldar is the most viewed television programs in Nepal showed in Kantipur Television HD. This is also a social serial that resembles typical Nepali Society. This program was aired in Kantipur Television on 22 January 2021 at 9:00 PM

snippet.title: Godzilla vs. Kong – Official Trailer
snippet.description:
In theaters and streaming exclusively on @HBOMax* March 26.
 
*Available on @HBOMax in the US only, for 31 days, at no extra cost to subscribers.

https://www.godzillavskong.com/
https://www.facebook.com/GodzillaVsKong
https://www.instagram.com/godzillavskong/
https://twitter.com/GodzillaVsKong

---

From Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures comes the long-awaited face-off between two icons, “Godzilla vs. Kong,” the next epic adventure in Legendary’s cinematic Monsterverse, directed by Adam Wingard.

Legends collide in “Godzilla vs. Kong” as these mythic adversaries meet in a spectacular battle for the ages, with the fate of the world hanging in the balance.  Kong and his protectors undertake a perilous journey to find his true home, and with them is Jia, a young orphaned girl with whom he has formed a unique and powerful bond.  But they unexpectedly find themselves in the path of an enraged Godzilla, cutting a swath of destruction across the globe.  The epic clash between the two titans—instigated by unseen forces—is only the beginning of the mystery that lies deep within the core of the Earth.

The film stars Alexander Skarsgård (“Big Little Lies,” “The Little Drummer Girl”), Millie Bobby Brown (“Stranger Things”), Rebecca Hall (“Christine,” “Professor Marston and the Wonder Women”), Brian Tyree Henry (“Joker,” “Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse”), Shun Oguri (“Weathering with You”), Eiza González (“Fast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shaw”), Julian Dennison (“Deadpool 2”), with Kyle Chandler (“Godzilla: King of the Monsters”) and Demián Bichir (“The Nun,” “The Hateful Eight”).
Wingard (“The Guest,” “You’re Next”) directed from a screenplay by Eric Pearson (“Thor: Ragnarok”) and Max Borenstein (“Godzilla: King of the Monsters,” “Kong: Skull Island”), story by Terry Rossio (“Pirates of the Caribbean: Dead Men Tell No Tales”) and Michael Dougherty & Zach Shields (“Godzilla: King of the Monsters”), based on the character “Godzilla” owned and created by TOHO CO., LTD.  The film was produced by Mary Parent, Alex Garcia, Eric McLeod, Jon Jashni, Thomas Tull and Brian Rogers, with Jay Ashenfelter, Herbert W. Gains, Dan Lin, Roy Lee, Yoshimitsu Banno and Kenji Okuhira executive producing.

The director’s behind-the-scenes creative team included director of photography Ben Seresin (“The Mummy,” “World War Z”), production designers Owen Paterson (“Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle,” “Godzilla”) and Thomas S. Hammock (“Blair Witch”), editor Josh Schaeffer (“Godzilla: King of the Monsters”), costume designer Ann Foley (“Skyscraper”) and visual effects supervisor John “DJ” DesJardin (upcoming “Zack Snyder’s Justice League”).

Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures Present a Legendary Pictures Production, A Film By Adam Wingard, “Godzilla vs. Kong.”  The film will be released nationwide in 2D and 3D in select theaters and IMAX on March 26, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.  It is rated PG-13 for intense sequences of creature violence/destruction and brief language.

snippet.description:
Meri Bassai is one of the longest and most popular Nepali comedy serials with 16 Years of broadcasting. Based on rural lifestyle and lower-middle-class people, the series represents many political and social issues on its episodes with educational comedy flavour. It is aired in Nepal Television at 8:45 PM and in YouTube at 9:30 PM every Tuesday. This show is produced by Media Hub Pvt. Ltd. 

The story is based on the rural lifestyle and lower-middle-class people. The show represents many political as well as social issues on its episodes with educational comedy flavour.

snippet.title: नेकपाको दाहाल पक्षको आज काठमाडौंमा बृहत् जनप्रदर्शनसहित आमसभा
snippet.description:
नेकपाको दाहाल पक्षले आज काठमाडौंमा बृहत् जनप्रदर्शनसहित आमसभा गर्दैछ।
बिहान ११ बजेबाट काठमाडौंका पाँच स्थानबाट एकैसाथ जुलुस सुरु हुने र प्रर्दशनीमार्गमा पुगेर सभामा परिणत हुने कार्यक्रम छ । सभालाई शीर्ष नेताहरूले सम्बोधन गर्ने छन्। जुलुश काठमाडौं उपत्यकाको पुल्चोक, त्रिपुरेश्वर, माइतीघर, केशरमहल र जमलबाट निक्लिएका जुलुस सुन्धारामा मिसिनेछन् । दिउँसो हुने सभाका लागि  बिहानैदेखि काठमाडौं सडकमा ट्राफिक व्यवस्थापनमा कठिनाइ भएको छ । यातायात अस्तव्यस्त भएको छ । सार्वजनिक सवारीसाधनलाई रत्नपार्क लगायत सहरका मुख्य भाग प्रवेशमा रोक लगाइएको छ, जसका कारण विद्यालय, अस्पताल, परीक्षा लगायत अति जरूरी कामका लागि पनि यात्रुले लामो दूरी पैदलै हिँड्नुपरेको छ । प्रधानमन्त्री केपी शर्मा ओलीले गत पुस ५ मा प्रतिनिधि सभा विघटन गरेपछि नेकपा दुई समूहमा विभाजित छ। ओली र दाहाल खेमाले संसद विघटनको मुद्धालाई लिएर पक्ष र विपक्षमा छुटा छुटै देशब्यापी सभा र प्रर्दशन  गरिरहेका छन् । आजको प्रदर्शनका लागि यस खेमाले देशका विभिन्न ठाउँबाट कार्यकर्ता र समर्थकलाइ काठमाडौँ उतारेको छ । प्रदर्शनमा दुई लाख मानिस सडकमा उतार्ने दाहाल समूहको दावी छ।

snippet.title: Uttarakhand Glacier Burst Live । Chamoli Avalanche । उत्तराखंड । Rishi Ganga Dhauliganga Joshimath
snippet.description:
Uttarakhand Glacier Burst: उउत्तराखंड के चमोली जिले में ग्लेशियर फटने से बड़ी तबाही हुई है. चमोली जिले जोशीमठ में ग्लेशियर टूटने से धौलीगंगा नदी में बाढ़ आ गई. पानी तेज गति से आगे बढ़ रहा है. आसपास के इलाकों में बाढ़ का पानी फैलने की आशंका है, लिहाजा आसपास के इलाकों से लोगों को बाहर निकाला जा रहा है. इससे ऋषिगंगा प्रोजेक्ट को नुकसान पहुंचा है. आईटीबीपी, NDRF और SDRG की कई टीमें मौके पर पहुंचीं हैं. श्रीनगर, ऋषिकेश और हरिद्वार में अलर्ट है. उत्तराखंड के CM त्रिवेंद्र सिंह रावत ने घटना स्थल पर पहुंच स्थिति की जानकारी ली है. हर अपडेट जानने के लिए पेज रिफ्रेश करते रहें.

#UttarakhandGlacierBurst #ChamoliGlacierBurst #GlacierBurst #ATLivestream
